model_specification_line: result = smf.wls("full_time ~ treated * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(birthyr) + LFPR + UNEMP + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df["statefip"]})
